notasTacticas: User input said "Triparasura"; resolved to Tripurasura.

habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Change Shape (Su) The tripurasura has only one alternative form-when it uses change shape, it always appears as the same Small humanoid. Most take the form of gnomes or human children.  Elusive (Su) The tripurasura and items it carries are considered to be under the effects of a nondetection spell. A caster must succeed at a DC 14 caster level check to overcome this effect.  Poison (Ex) Tongue-injury; save Fort DC 12; frequency 1/round for 6 rounds; effect 1d2 Wis damage; cure 1 save.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Change Shape (Su) The tripurasura has only one alternative form-when it uses change shape, it always appears as the same Small humanoid. Most take the form of gnomes or human children.  Elusive (Su) The tripurasura and items it carries are considered to be under the effects of a nondetection spell. A caster must succeed at a DC 14 caster level check to overcome this effect.  Poison (Ex) Tongue-injury; save Fort DC 12; frequency 1/round for 6 rounds; effect 1d2 Wis damage; cure 1 save.

fullStatBlock:
CR 2
Tripurasura
LE Tiny outsider asura, evil, extraplanar, lawful
Init +2
Senses darkvision 60 ft., detect magic; Perception +10
AC 16, touch 16, flat-footed 13 (+2 Dex, +1 dodge, +1 insight, +2 size)
hp 19 ((3d10+3))
Fort +4, Ref +3, Will +5
Speed 20 ft.
Melee Sting +7 (1d4-1 piercing)
Special Abilities Change Shape (Su) The tripurasura has only one alternative form-when it uses change shape, it always appears as the same Small humanoid. Most take the form of gnomes or human children.  Elusive (Su) The tripurasura and items it carries are considered to be under the effects of a nondetection spell. A caster must succeed at a DC 14 caster level check to overcome this effect.  Poison (Ex) Tongue-injury; save Fort DC 12; frequency 1/round for 6 rounds; effect 1d2 Wis damage; cure 1 save.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 8, Dex 14, Con 12, Int 13, Wis 15, Cha 13
Base Atk +3; CMB +3; CMD 14
Feats Dodge, Weapon Finesse
Skills Acrobatics +8 (+4 when jumping), Appraise +4, Bluff +7, Escape Artist +8, Knowledge (arcana) +4, Knowledge (planes) +7, Perception +10, Perform (dance) +5, Spellcraft +4, Stealth +14
Languages Common, Infernal
Environment  any (Hell)
Organization solitary, pair, or gang (3-10)
Treasure standard
Immune curse effects, disease, poison
Resist acid 10, electricity 10
Source PFRPG Bestiary 3
